title: Quick Tutorial on scads
text: Confirm PolyFUN runs conda environment Load R packages Load example data Prepare GWAS summary statistics file
code: conda activate /dartfs/rc/lab/S/Szhao/liyang/conda/base_clone/ library(scads) library(data.table) # Access the dataset data("demo_count_matrix")  # Examine dataset dim(demo_count_matrix) #> [1]  100 1000 demo_count_matrix[1:5,1:5] #>      chr5:130672416-130672916 chr4:8726737-8727237 chr15:76191731-76192231 #> [1,]                        7                    1                       7 #> [2,]                        3                    2                       1 #> [3,]                       27                    7                       3 #> [4,]                        1                    1                      11 #> [5,]                       13                   20                       4 #>      chr7:26118486-26118986 chr9:115662457-115662957 #> [1,]                      2                        5 #> [2,]                      1                        0 #> [3,]                      7                        8 #> [4,]                      3                        3 #> [5,]                     20                        4 data_file <- system.file("extdata", "SIM_sumstats_chr10.txt.gz", package = "scads") sumstats <- fread(data_file, header = T) #> Warning in fileAccess.default(pathT, mode = 2): file.access(..., mode=2) and #> file(..., open="ab") gives different results (-1 != 0). Will use the file() #> results: /tmp/RtmpIUODho/F #> Warning in fileAccess.default(pathT, mode = 2): file.access(..., mode=2) and #> file(..., open="ab") gives different results (-1 != 0). Will use the file() #> results: /tmp/RtmpIUODho/Y #> Warning in fileAccess.default(pathT, mode = 2): file.access(..., mode=2) and #> file(..., open="ab") gives different results (-1 != 0). Will use the file() #> results: /tmp/RtmpIUODho/T head(sumstats) #>      chr    pos        beta         se     a0     a1         snp       pval #>    <int>  <int>       <num>      <num> <char> <char>      <char>      <num> #> 1:    10 134706  0.05536500 0.05685897      C      T  rs55896525 0.33019827 #> 2:    10 136067 -0.02858211 0.04524603      C      T rs185642176 0.52758333 #> 3:    10 136104 -0.01931718 0.04723619      C      G rs141504207 0.68257926 #> 4:    10 140366 -0.04360189 0.02560643      C      T  rs10904045 0.08861778 #> 5:    10 141014 -0.03969239 0.02519304      G      A   rs6560828 0.11514118 #> 6:    10 141602  0.02325330 0.02690964      G      C  rs35849539 0.38752373 #>        zscore #>         <num> #> 1:  0.9737251 #> 2: -0.6317043 #> 3: -0.4089487 #> 4: -1.7027712 #> 5: -1.5755300 #> 6:  0.8641252

title: Quick Tutorial on scads
text: Run fastTopics fastTopics: fit model obtain topics fastTopics-DE: obtain peaks associated topics locfdr: adjust multiple testing [issue NA runs - TODO: FIX ISUE] (Current resolution: just run ) Create topic annotations LDSC Run LDSC Resolved issues - running though enrichment results make sense Calculate Cell Score Made topic enrichment estimates (topic 2 enriched) out1 (fastTopics results) cs (cell scores)
code: scads_res <- scads(demo_count_matrix,                       nTopics = 5,                       bed_dir = "/dartfs/rc/lab/S/Szhao/liyang/SCSviaTM/analysis/simu_20241028/bed_dir",                       sumstats_dir = "/dartfs/rc/lab/S/Szhao/liyang/SCSviaTM/analysis/simu_20241028",                       gwas_nsamps = 45000,                       gwas_trait = "SIM",                       outdir = "/dartfs/rc/lab/S/Szhao/liyang/SCSviaTM/analysis/simu_20241028/scads")

what: What the Package Does (One Line, Title Case)
title: What the Package Does (One Line, Title Case)
text: Single Cell ATAC-seq Disease Score

what: Create SNP Annotations Based on BED Files and Baseline Annotations — create_annotations
title: Create SNP Annotations Based on BED Files and Baseline Annotations — create_annotations
text: function annotates SNPs based overlap BED files merges baseline annotations. outputs combined annotations computes number SNPs annotation.

title: Create SNP Annotations Based on BED Files and Baseline Annotations — create_annotations
code: create_annotations(   bim_file,   bed_files = NULL,   baseline_file,   outfile = NULL,   Mfile = NULL )

title: Create SNP Annotations Based on BED Files and Baseline Annotations — create_annotations
text: bim_file data frame character string specifying path BIM file. BIM file columns: SNP: SNP identifier CHR: Chromosome number BP: Base pair position A1: Allele 1 A2: Allele 2 bed_files character string specifying directory containing BED files, vector BED file paths. Default NULL. baseline_file data frame character string specifying path baseline annotations file. outfile Optional. character string specifying path save combined annotations. Default NULL. Mfile Optional. character string specifying path save number SNPs per annotation. Default NULL.

title: Create SNP Annotations Based on BED Files and Baseline Annotations — create_annotations
text: data frame containing combined annotations.

title: Helper functions for scads — de_analysis2
text: modified de_analysis function fastTopics

title: Helper functions for scads — de_analysis2
code: de_analysis2(   fit,   X,   s = rowSums(X),   pseudocount = 0.01,   fit.method = c("scd", "em", "mu", "ccd", "glm"),   shrink.method = c("ash", "none"),   lfc.stat = "le",   control = list(),   verbose = TRUE,   ... )

what: Generate BED Files from Topic Annotations — get_annot_beds
title: Generate BED Files from Topic Annotations — get_annot_beds
text: function generates BED files topic based provided topic annotations.

title: Generate BED Files from Topic Annotations — get_annot_beds
Generate BED Files from Topic Annotations — get_annot_beds
text: topics_res list containing factor matrices Fmat Lmat, differential expression results de_res, p-values matrix p_jk. topics_annot matrix data frame containing topic annotations (peaks x topics). Rows correspond peaks names format "chr:start-end". Columns correspond topics. topics_prob matrix probability peak topic output_dir character string specifying output directory BED files. fuzzy Logical value indicating whether create fuzzy annotations (default: FALSE). cutoff Numeric value specifying cutoff binary annotations fuzzy = FALSE (default: 0.5).

title: Generate BED Files from Topic Annotations — get_annot_beds
text: None. BED files written specified output directory.

title: Compute Single-Cell Level Scores (c_i) — get_cs
text: function computes single-cell level scores (\(c_i\)) based fastTopics model outputs required parameters.

title: Compute Single-Cell Level Scores (c_i) — get_cs
Compute Single-Cell Level Scores (c_i) — get_cs
text: topic_res Results run_fastTopics p_jk Matrix probabilities peaks topics (peaks x topics), obtained F matrix fastTopics. l_ik Matrix topic proportions cell (cells x topics), obtained L matrix fastTopics. ldsc_res Enrichment results run_ldsc tau_Ck Vector per-topic heritability contributions (\(\tau_{C_k}\)) length K (number topics).

title: Compute Single-Cell Level Scores (c_i) — get_cs
text: vector single-cell level scores (\(c_i\)) length (number cells).

title: Compute Single-Cell Level Scores (c_i) — get_cs
text: function computes scores based following corrected approximation: $$ c_i = \frac{ \left( \frac{E(M_i)}{E(N_i)} \left[ 1 - \frac{\text{Cov}(M_i, N_i)}{E(M_i) E(N_i)} + \frac{\text{Var}(N_i)}{[E(N_i)]^2} \right] \right) }{ \left( \frac{ \sum_{j=1}^{J} h_j }{ J } \right) } $$ : \(E(M_i)\) \(E(N_i)\) expected values. \(\text{Cov}(M_i, N_i)\) covariance \(M_i\) \(N_i\). \(\text{Var}(N_i)\) variance \(N_i\).

what: Run fastTopics and Generate Topic Annotations — run_fastTopics
title: Run fastTopics and Generate Topic Annotations — run_fastTopics
text: function runs fastTopics model provided count matrix, performs differential expression analysis, computes p-values, returns factor matrices along differential expression results.

title: Run fastTopics and Generate Topic Annotations — run_fastTopics
Run fastTopics and Generate Topic Annotations — run_fastTopics
text: count_matrix numeric matrix sparse matrix counts cells rows peaks columns. nTopics integer specifying number topics fit. Default 10. ... Additional arguments passed fastTopics::fit_topic_model().

title: Run fastTopics and Generate Topic Annotations — run_fastTopics
text: list containing factor matrices Fmat Lmat, differential expression results de_res, p-values matrix p_jk.

title: Run fastTopics and Generate Topic Annotations — run_fastTopics
text: function ensures count matrix cells rows peaks columns. runs fastTopics model, performs differential expression analysis, computes local false discovery rates (lfdr), calculates p-values peak-topic pair.

title: Run fastTopics and Generate Topic Annotations — run_fastTopics
code: if (FALSE) { # Assuming 'counts' is your count matrix results <- run_fastTopics(counts, nTopics = 5) }

title: Run LDSC Pipeline — run_ldsc
text: function runs LDSC pipeline using PolyFun enrichment analysis.

title: Run LDSC Pipeline — run_ldsc
code: run_ldsc(   polyfun_path,   sumstats_path,   n,   trait,   rcode_path,   onekg_path,   bed_dir,   baseline_dir,   weights_dir,   out_dir )

title: Run LDSC Pipeline — run_ldsc
text: polyfun_path character string specifying directory PolyFun package. sumstats_path character string specifying directory cleaned summary statistics file. n Number samples GWAS. trait GWAS trait (e.g. SIM simulated) rcode_path character string specifying directory Rscripts running LDSC onekg_path character string specifying directory 1000G genotypes data bed_dir character string specifying directory BED files. baseline_dir character string specifying directory baseline annotations LDSC weights_dir character string specifying directory weights provided LDSC out_dir character string specifying output directory LDSC enrichment results.

title: Run LDSC Pipeline — run_ldsc
text: None. LDSC results written specified output directory.

code: scads(   count_matrix,   nTopics = 10,   bed_dir,   sumstats_dir,   gwas_nsamps,   gwas_trait,   outdir,   ... )

title: scads: A function for using scATAC-seq data and GWAS sumstats to calculate disease cell score — scads
text: count_matrix peak--cell count matrix. nTopics number topics (clusters) fit. Default 10. bed_dir  ... Additional arguments passed internal functions.

title: scads: A function for using scATAC-seq data and GWAS sumstats to calculate disease cell score — scads
text: list containing fitted topic model, enrichment results, cell scores.
